title: Kashimo (Mythical Beast Amber) Cursed Fate ADDON
description: Addon for the Cursed Fate mod Featuring a new CT, Kashimo (MBA)
body:
Ability 1: Normal variant: kick
Air variant: Broken

Ability 2: Projectile (held), it can be performed in the air

Ability 3: Dash
while sneaking: sends you upwards

Ability 4: Normal: Barrage of slashes with a final big slash (held) Maxoutput/Flow version: Charge up, then dash, charge up again into big punch (HELD)

Ability 5: Block (Held) you block for a second and after that release a counter

Ability 6: Mythical Beast form, Maxoutput, big buffs but you get a lot of debuffs when it ends

THE ABILITY 6 SONG IS Don't Get In My Way - EUPHONIC RUSH by Bonesaw

Gamerule for not breaking blocks: /gamerule worldDestruction false
or smth like that I dont rembember

gamerule for turning off music: /gamerule KashimoMusic false

Discord server where ill be posting my CTs: https://discord.gg/5qAPzAuMP3

My Ko-Fi (you can buy CTs): https://ko-fi.com/wagyumeoooow
